title: agropyron trachycaulum var. glaucum
intro: Agropyron trachycaulum var. glaucum, also known as blue wheatgrass or glaucous wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Agropyron trachycaulum var. glaucum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis and digestive issues.
